description: Quick MCMC diagnostic check (R-hat, ESS, divergences, tree depth) on a saved PyMC/ArviZ InferenceData .nc file.
rules: read-only — never mutates the input or any remote/live service
input is a netCDF InferenceData file written by idata.to_netcdf(...)
requires arviz (+ pymc) importable for real output; absent libs produce a graceful {} stub
diagnostic summary written to record_store as diagnostics.json
usage: Set IDATA (path to a .nc InferenceData file). Optional VAR_NAMES (comma-separated). Output: diagnostics.json.
limitation: Read-only quick check only. Needs arviz/pymc + the netCDF backend to emit real R-hat/ESS/divergence numbers; offline it writes an empty JSON stub. No plots (see diagnostic_report).
